title: cineraria cyanomontana
intro: Cineraria cyanomontana, also known as the Cape marguerite or blue marguerite, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria cyanomontana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health issues.
